token_optimization_status: Use local status JSON and 8805 API instead of rereading historic handover.
Use local scheduled workers for routine status, prediction and publishing.
Keep long ScarFLIX validation detached under local controller ownership.
overall_timeline_estimate: First major milestone: 1-3 days depending on PlatformGate/provider result.

automation_health.summary: PlatformGate is marked running, but child progress is older than 5 minutes. Controller/watchdog stale recovery should handle this.

recent_updates.title: Watchdog-of-watchdog sentinel added
recent_updates.detail: Added Node sentinel triggered by dashboard and mirror workers so disabled watchdogs, stale locks, stale checkpoints, and stale dashboard/mirror status self-detect and recover without blocking on PowerShell.

recent_updates.title: Dashboard stall recovered
recent_updates.detail: Watchdog task was re-enabled, stale PlatformGate locks were backed up and removed, controller was retriggered, and InstantStatus was made non-recursive.

recent_updates.title: Five-minute watchdog and retry hardening applied
recent_updates.detail: Installed the watchdog scheduled task, added five-minute stall detection, and changed repeated transient PlatformGate reviews to retry/backoff instead of BLOCKED_LOOP.

recent_updates.title: Watchdog and stall detector added
recent_updates.detail: Created a persistent stall detector, dashboard-triggered fallback, watchdog status files, and Stall Risk dashboard column.

recent_updates.title: Controller schedule re-enabled
recent_updates.detail: Autonomous controller task was enabled and relaunched so future progress does not depend on Codex.

recent_updates.title: Autonomous progress visibility added
recent_updates.detail: Dashboard now shows recent achievements, heartbeat freshness, stall-watch state, and whether Codex is needed.

recent_updates.title: Phone-readable dashboard published
recent_updates.detail: Generated a rendered HTML dashboard and mirrored it to the public repository.

recent_updates.title: Controller/PlatformGate reliability patched
recent_updates.detail: Bounded checkpoint publishing, child-active detection, orphan-lock recovery, and 15-minute stale-progress recovery were added.

recent_updates.title: PlatformGate cycle relaunched locally
recent_updates.detail: Detached PlatformGate restarted with catalogue expansion still disabled.

outcomes.target: Full streaming, rich tool calling, traces, autonomous worker triggering, voice and persistent memory.
outcomes.current: 8805 Node brain online; 8791 reachable; local tools/status exposed.

outcomes.current: Visible 78 items; movies=53; tv=25; .strm movies=1; .strm tv=0; .strm total=1; PlatformGate=RUNNING.
